title: Polish Apple Pudding
description: A rich and indulgent Polish dessert made with apples, perfect for a cozy evening treat.
instructions: Peel, core, and chop the apples. Set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and a pinch of salt.
Add the unsalted butter and mix until crumbly.
Beat in the eggs until well combined.
Stir in the pudding mix, milk, and vanilla extract.
Gently fold in the chopped apples.
Pour the batter into a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
